title: A lonely Light
blurb: There is nothing particularly technical about this photo, nor honestly is there much story to it. I was in the backyard with my dog one evening, debating on whether or not it was clear enough to setup for some astrophotography. I decided against it due to the looming clouds, but my neighbors back porch light had caught my attention. The street lights were out, and no other neighbors had their lights on at the time. It was eerily dark, saving this lone light, gently illuminating the area about it. Perhaps it is my fondness for the warm glow of a lower temperature light that drew me to is, almost like a moth. Yet, for my first month of meridian on this new site, I can think of nothing better then that of a new, lone light sprouting forward.
